name: home-care-pwa
description: PWA mobile-first e sicura per la gestione Home Care.

scripts.predeploy: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.check: node --check server3.js && node --check scripts/migrate.js && node --check scripts/seed.js && node --check scripts/start-stable.js && node --check scripts/validate-static.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/install-app.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check tests/app.test.js && npm run validate:static
